title: Lecturer Gizem Türker Appointed as Committee Member at International AI Conference
content:
Student

News

Details

Lecturer Gizem Türker Appointed as Committee Member at International AI Conference

Lecturer Gizem Türker, Head of the Artificial Intelligence Operations Programme at Doğuş University’s Vocational School, has been invited to join the Programme Call for Papers (CfP) Committee of the Diva 2026 – Dive into AI Conference and has become a committee member.

At this event, one of Turkey’s leading artificial intelligence and technology conferences, our academic will play an active role in the scientific review and programme development processes.

We congratulate her and wish her continued success.
